login_flow.notes: Login with admin@voyager.local / admin123 works. Logout → redirect to /login with returnUrl. Login form placeholders are NOT actual values (user must type credentials manually even when placeholders show them) — minor UX issue.

sidebar_6_items.notes: Sidebar has AI Assistant (/ai) and Dashboards (/dashboards) instead of Events (/events) and Logs (/logs). The /events and /logs pages exist and work but are NOT in the sidebar. This deviates from Phase 1 spec.

sidebar_no_admin_items.notes: No admin items (Users, Teams, Permissions, Webhooks, Feature Flags, Audit Log) visible in sidebar — all moved to /settings tabs.

sidebar_collapse_on_cluster_pages.notes: Sidebar auto-collapses to icon-only mode on /clusters/[id] pages. Expand button visible and works.

sidebar_cmdb_toggle.notes: Collapse/expand button works. Cmd+B keyboard shortcut not tested (browser automation limitation).

settings_all_tabs.notes: All 7 Settings tabs present and load content.

settings_general_tab.notes: Cluster Connection, Platform Info, AI BYOK, Registered Clusters, About — all sections present with data.

settings_feature_flags_tab.notes: Feature Flags tab works at /settings/features (NOT /settings/feature-flags which 404s).

cluster_detail_routing.notes: /clusters/[id] routes work with full UUID IDs.

cluster_overview_no_duplicates.notes: No duplicate stat cards in cluster Overview. Shows: Nodes 1, Pods 13/13, Namespaces 6, Version v1.33.

cluster_nodes_tab.notes: Nodes tab shows 1 node (minikube, Ready, control-plane, v1.33.0, Debian GNU/Linux 12).

cluster_pods_tab.notes: Pods tab loads (with ~3s delay) showing all 13 pods across 3 namespaces.

cluster_deployments_tab.notes: Deployments tab shows 'data coming in Phase 2' placeholder — expected behavior for Phase 1.

dashboard_cluster_cards.notes: Dashboard shows 2 cluster cards (prod-cluster-eks, test-cluster-minikube) with proper data.

dashboard_quick_links.notes: Clicking cluster card navigates to correct /clusters/[uuid] detail page.

dashboard_health_info.notes: System Health section visible on Dashboard with 2 clusters and status.

dashboard_stat_cards.notes: Total Nodes, Running Pods, Clusters, Warning Events stats present.

alerts_anomalies_section.notes: Anomalies section visible on /alerts with 12 detected, filterable by severity/status/cluster.

dark_mode.notes: Dark mode works. Theme toggle cycles Dark → Light → System.

light_mode.notes: Light mode works with full functionality.

errors.notes: Combined tRPC batch query returns 404. Pages still load data (fallback to individual queries likely). Present on Dashboard and Cluster detail pages.
Wrong URL navigated during testing — correct URL is /settings/features. Not a production bug.

issues.title: Sidebar has wrong items — AI Assistant + Dashboards instead of Events + Logs
issues.steps: Open any page and look at sidebar navigation
issues.expected: 6 items: Dashboard, Clusters, Alerts, Events, Logs, Settings
issues.actual: 6 items: Dashboard, Clusters, Alerts, AI Assistant, Dashboards, Settings
issues.notes: Events (/events) and Logs (/logs) pages exist and work but are NOT linked from sidebar. AI Assistant and Dashboards (coming soon placeholder) are in sidebar instead.

issues.title: tRPC batch endpoint returns 404 — console errors on every page
issues.steps: Open browser console on any page
issues.notes: Present on Dashboard and Cluster detail pages. Data still loads (fallback appears to work) but generates persistent console errors.

issues.title: Login form placeholders not treated as values — must type credentials manually
issues.steps: 1. Logout. 2. See login form with placeholders showing admin@voyager.local. 3. Click Sign In without typing.
issues.expected: Form either auto-fills or placeholder values are correctly ignored
issues.actual: Clicking Sign In without typing shows 'Invalid email address' + 'Password is required' — confusing UX
issues.notes: Functional: login works when credentials are typed. UX/accessibility issue only.

issues.title: Dashboards page is Coming Soon placeholder
issues.expected: Either not in sidebar or fully functional
issues.actual: Sidebar item leads to empty placeholder page
issues.notes: Not critical but means a sidebar item leads to a dead-end, consuming valuable navigation real estate.

what_works: Settings page all 7 tabs present and load data (General, Users, Teams, Permissions, Webhooks, Feature Flags, Audit Log)
Cluster detail /clusters/[id] with 10 tabs (Overview, Nodes, Pods, Deployments, Services, Namespaces, Events, Logs, Metrics, Autoscaling)
Cluster Overview shows correct data with NO duplicate stat cards
Sidebar collapses on cluster detail pages (auto-collapse behavior)
Dashboard: cluster cards with working quick-links to /clusters/[uuid]
Alerts page: Alert Rules (16+ rules), Recent Triggers, Anomalies (12 detected) all visible
Both dark mode and light mode work (theme toggle cycles)
Cluster Nodes tab: shows real node data
Cluster Pods tab: loads all 13 pods (with brief delay)
/events page exists and shows 50 events with filtering
/logs page exists and works with pod selector
recommendations: CRITICAL: Fix sidebar — replace 'AI Assistant' and 'Dashboards' links with 'Events' (/events) and 'Logs' (/logs) per Phase 1 spec. AI Assistant can remain accessible via /ai but should not replace core spec items.
FIX: Investigate tRPC batch endpoint 404 — the combined query format appears unsupported. Either implement the batch handler or remove the batch query and use individual queries consistently.
UX: Login form — either use HTML `value` attribute for pre-filled credentials or remove placeholder-only pre-fills that mislead users into thinking credentials are already entered.
DECIDE: Either remove 'Dashboards' sidebar item (Coming Soon placeholder is not production-ready) or mark it clearly as 'coming soon' with a badge.
NOTE: /settings/feature-flags 404 is expected since the correct URL is /settings/features — no redirect exists. Consider adding redirect for backwards compatibility.
